src: This repository is for the legacy Mixed Reality Toolkit (MRTK) v2.  For the latest version of the MRTK please visit https://github.com/MixedRealityToolkit/MixedRealityToolkit-Unity
ja: このリポジトリはレガシーのMixed Reality Toolkit（MRTK）v2向けです。MRTKの最新バージョンはhttps://github.com/MixedRealityToolkit/MixedRealityToolkit-Unityをご覧ください。
